tools.name: xAmzTargetMacieServiceAssociateMemberAccount.associateMemberAccount
tools.description: (Discontinued) Associates a specified Amazon Web Services account with Amazon Macie Classic as a member account.

tools.name: xAmzTargetMacieServiceAssociateS3Resources.associateS3Resources
tools.description: (Discontinued) Associates specified S3 resources with Amazon Macie Classic for monitoring and data classification. If memberAccountId isn't specified, the action associates specified S3 resources with Macie Classic for the current Macie Classic administrator account. If memberAccountId is specified, the action associates specified S3 resources with Macie Classic for the specified member account.

tools.name: xAmzTargetMacieServiceDisassociateMemberAccount.disassociateMemberAccount
tools.description: (Discontinued) Removes the specified member account from Amazon Macie Classic.

tools.name: xAmzTargetMacieServiceDisassociateS3Resources.disassociateS3Resources
tools.description: (Discontinued) Removes specified S3 resources from being monitored by Amazon Macie Classic. If memberAccountId isn't specified, the action removes specified S3 resources from Macie Classic for the current Macie Classic administrator account. If memberAccountId is specified, the action removes specified S3 resources from Macie Classic for the specified member account.

tools.name: xAmzTargetMacieServiceListMemberAccounts.listMemberAccounts
tools.description: (Discontinued) Lists all Amazon Macie Classic member accounts for the current Macie Classic administrator account.

tools.name: xAmzTargetMacieServiceListS3Resources.listS3Resources
tools.description: (Discontinued) Lists all the S3 resources associated with Amazon Macie Classic. If memberAccountId isn't specified, the action lists the S3 resources associated with Macie Classic for the current Macie Classic administrator account. If memberAccountId is specified, the action lists the S3 resources associated with Macie Classic for the specified member account.

tools.name: xAmzTargetMacieServiceUpdateS3Resources.updateS3Resources
tools.description: (Discontinued) Updates the classification types for the specified S3 resources. If memberAccountId isn't specified, the action updates the classification types of the S3 resources associated with Amazon Macie Classic for the current Macie Classic administrator account. If memberAccountId is specified, the action updates the classification types of the S3 resources associated with Macie Classic for the specified member account.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
